collectors.title: Database

queries.sql: SELECT s.name AS subject_name, ROUND(AVG(g.score / g.max_score * 100), 2) AS avg_score_pct FROM grades g JOIN subjects s ON g.subject_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name ORDER BY avg_score_pct DESC LIMIT 50
